sourcePlans: Final execution safety and cutover contracts

conflictResolutions.resolution: Closed ticket shows only Reopen and Delete; deletion is transcript-first and transcript failure blocks deletion.
Use compact channel budgets and owner-selected premium readable naming; no generic emoji spam or corporate codes.
Made By Fieel appears only on selected important static panels, never active sessions, welcome/leave or ticket state posts.
Public help is member-safe; staff command guide is private, role-aware and template-aware.
Training/Tryout active posts are plain Markdown; only configured result/static panels may be embeds.

requirements.title: Paid license reveal and repair regression safety
requirements.description: Paid active licenses must never report an available key while secure reveal/copy is unavailable. Repair stays on the same entitlement record and logs only masked metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: GET metadata never exposes a raw key
authenticated POST reveal/copy returns a usable key or support-safe error
requirements.blocker: Post-deploy owner browser and production scan are blocked by unavailable owner Chrome connection.
requirements.nextExactAction: Reconnect owner browser; run masked paid-license scan and copy/reveal test without recording the key.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Fail-closed runtime environment guard
requirements.description: Development, staging and production must be explicit. Missing or malformed environment identity must never default to production or permit production Discord mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: production mutation requires explicit production guard
only the exact test guild can run setup/create-missing/rebuild/smoke
no secret values appear in error output
requirements.nextExactAction: Create the redacted staging/production readiness contract for ENV-002; do not widen the exact test-guild guard.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Environment deployment separation
requirements.description: Development, staging and production need distinct DB identity, OAuth callback, session secret, bot identity and mutation policy.
acceptanceCriteria: production credentials cannot be accepted in staging guard
requirements.blocker: Real staging/Render identities were not inspected or changed in this local worktree.
requirements.nextExactAction: Have the owner provision separate staging identities, then run the redacted readiness check before any staging deploy.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Owner Console versus customer dashboard authorization
requirements.description: Owner-only operational APIs are separate from customer guild workspaces. Customer users can view only Discord guilds where they have Manage Guild or Administrator.
acceptanceCriteria: customer dashboard does not expose owner operations
requirements.nextExactAction: Integrate workspace access into customer-facing server selector/config APIs after the existing owner-only endpoint split is mapped.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Dashboard API and OAuth hardening
requirements.description: OAuth state/PKCE, CSRF, secure sessions, rate limits, encrypted provider token storage, webhook signatures and owner session revocation are enforced.
acceptanceCriteria: CSRF retry does not bypass authorization
requirements.nextExactAction: Design after the shared guild authorization foundation is established.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Configuration versioning and audit foundation
requirements.description: Every guild configuration save creates a schema-versioned snapshot, field-level diff, actor, source and rollback record.
acceptanceCriteria: one safe config save creates an audit row
requirements.nextExactAction: Add authorized config-version history reading and rollback preview before exposing rollback actions.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Feature flags and kill switches
requirements.description: High-risk modules use global/environment/guild/plan/role scoped flags with safe disable/re-enable behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: disabled module rejects new action safely
test guild canary cannot affect production guild
requirements.nextExactAction: Persist flags through the versioned guild configuration envelope after CFG-001 is integrated.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: PostgreSQL guild-scope data foundation
requirements.description: Guild-local Paradise state moves from opaque state JSON toward scoped PostgreSQL records while global identity remains separate.
acceptanceCriteria: guild ID is required on new scoped records
requirements.nextExactAction: Inventory existing Setting JSON state and prepare additive migration preview; do not migrate production data yet.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Legacy state migration preview
requirements.description: Profiles, verification, panels, XP, tickets, applications, lineups, cooldowns and jobs receive backup, count comparison, duplicate detection and rollback-ready migration previews.
acceptanceCriteria: production apply is blocked without verified backup
requirements.blocker: Production DB state inspection is intentionally blocked without authenticated owner access.
requirements.nextExactAction: Design additive Prisma migration after production count preview and backup validation are available.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Backup integrity foundation
requirements.description: Backups carry schema version, counts, overwrite and panel metadata, checksum, validation and restore dry-run status.
acceptanceCriteria: restore dry-run verifies counts and schema
requirements.nextExactAction: Add restore dry-run validation and encrypted storage policy before any destructive rebuild path can consume backups.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Reconciliation health foundation
requirements.description: Recurring safe checks discover orphaned channels, roles, panels, tickets, transcripts, component schemas, leaderboard duplicates and cross-guild references.
acceptanceCriteria: overview can display last reconciliation safely
requirements.nextExactAction: Implement read-only reconciliation result builder for state/config records.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Central command registry
requirements.description: Every command/subcommand has one manifest for template, module, premium tier, channel, role, parameters, help text, audit and registration scope.
acceptanceCriteria: same manifest drives slash registration/help/backend authorization
disabled module command is rejected at runtime
requirements.nextExactAction: Map existing slash command builders, help rendering and handlers to this registry incrementally without unregistering commands prematurely.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Paradise RBAC and role manifest foundation
requirements.description: Discord role checks, Paradise permissions, hierarchy validation and role assignment authority are centralized.
requirements.nextExactAction: Map current Discord role IDs and existing staff checks to this vocabulary without changing role assignments.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Persistent Discord component protocol
requirements.description: Versioned custom IDs are guild scoped, restart safe, authorization checked and repairable without collectors.
requirements.nextExactAction: Migrate one non-destructive component family in the test guild and retain old-family repair messaging during the compatibility window.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Exact setup preview, status and audit commands
requirements.description: Setup commands use test-guild guard, preview/create-missing/repair/repost/backup/restore/rebuild/status/audit behavior and never mutate production without confirmation.
requirements.nextExactAction: Rebase existing setup handlers on the registry and environment guard; preserve current test guild behavior.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Customer dashboard baseline
requirements.description: Authorized login, top server selector, isolated routes, safe config save/reload, validation, toast and CSRF retry form the first dashboard proof.
requirements.blocker: Owner-authenticated browser interaction not currently available.
requirements.nextExactAction: Map existing dashboard APIs to guild-scope auth; defer visual polish until baseline save/reload works.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Test-guild-only smoke proof
requirements.description: The exact test guild proves safe guard, setup preview/status/audit, idempotency, persistent component restart and RBAC denial without production mutation.
requirements.nextExactAction: Repeat only after Milestone 1 guard/component/RBAC changes; do not rebuild the lab for artifact-only work.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Compact template architecture
requirements.description: Community, Clan and TSBTR enforce channel budgets, disabled-module absence, same-channel consolidation and test-before-main installation.
requirements.nextExactAction: Defer until Milestone 1 setup foundation is stable.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Premium controlled naming and branding
requirements.description: Five test-guild sidebar concepts precede owner selection. Naming is decorative but readable, template-specific, configurable and never production-applied without approval.
requirements.nextExactAction: Deferred until compact template foundation and owner branding decision.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Three language layers and natural copy
requirements.description: Personal dashboard language, guild canonical panel language and personal ephemeral help language remain separate; no language click creates duplicate panels.
acceptanceCriteria: canonical stored message edits in place
requirements.nextExactAction: Defer after component/config foundation.
requirements.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.

requirements.title: Canonical panels and handbooks
requirements.description: Overview, rules, roles, support, staff guides and operational channel handbooks are stored, pinned where needed and edited in place.

requirements.title: Leaderboard and stage/range rules

requirements.description: Post/autowin/score approval/co-ref/stroke reason workflows atomically update result, board, immunity, cooldown, availability, ticket and referee activity.

requirements.title: Ticket state machine and transcript-first delete
requirements.description: Open/claimed/closed controls are state-aware. Close/reopen/delete, transcripts, retention, naming, logs and safe failure behavior use one backend state machine.

testRequirements: voice type and temporary room live test
